meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building tutorials and start building revenue. Learn to implement high-conversion user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert guide.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell happens when your product lacks a clear value bridge. To escape, implement an interactive onboarding flow that forces a 'quick win' within the first 60 seconds. By automating this with Antigravity and Claude Code, you convert passive observers into active, paying users through immediate, tangible success.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks grinding out features, yet your analytics dashboard is a graveyard of abandoned sessions. You are trapped in 'tutorial hell'—a state where users sign up, stare at a blank dashboard, and vanish into the ether. You built a tool, but you forgot to build the bridge that leads them to the value.

This isn't a failure of code; it's a failure of narrative. To survive as a founder, you must stop treating onboarding as a 'nice-to-have' and start treating it as your most critical revenue driver. We are going to deploy a high-velocity onboarding sequence that forces user activation using the raw power of Antigravity and Claude Code.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that proves a user understands your product's value. We will map this to a single, high-impact CTA.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my codebase and identify the core function that delivers the primary value proposition to a new user. Suggest a simplified UI trigger for this action.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Analyze user journey and identify the primary value-add function for new signups.'

steps.title: Implement the Skeleton Screen
steps.description: Replace empty states with skeleton loaders to reduce perceived latency and keep users engaged while the AI processes their first request.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React component for a skeleton loader that mimics the structure of my primary data display dashboard.

steps.title: Contextual Tooltip Injection
steps.description: Use non-intrusive tooltips to guide users through the first interaction without overwhelming them with documentation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lightweight, CSS-only tooltip system that highlights the primary CTA button when the user first logs in.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file 'src/components/Dashboard.tsx' --instruction 'Add a conditional tooltip to the primary action button for first-time visitors.'

steps.title: Automated Progress Tracking
steps.description: Add a visual progress bar to show how close the user is to completing their first successful project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a progress state manager that tracks onboarding completion steps and exposes a percentage to the UI.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Implement a user-onboarding progress hook that updates based on completed tasks in the database.'

steps.title: The 'Quick Win' Feedback Loop
steps.description: Trigger a celebratory animation or modal once the user completes the first action, reinforcing the dopamine loop.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a confetti animation trigger function that fires only when a user successfully completes their first AI generation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file 'src/hooks/useGeneration.ts' --instruction 'Trigger a success notification/animation upon generation completion.'

pro_tips: Never ask for user input until they have seen the value of your product; lead with a pre-filled demo state.
Kill the 'Welcome Tour' overlay; users hate clicking through 10 slides before they can touch the product.
A/B test your onboarding CTA copy; changing one word can often increase conversion by 20% or more.
Use behavioral triggers to delay onboarding steps; if they are already exploring, don't interrupt them with a popup.
Always provide a 'Skip' button; forcing users through a flow they don't want is the fastest way to lose them.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, monitor your 'Time to First Value' (TTFV) metric. Use your analytics tool to identify where users drop off, then iterate on those specific steps using Claude Code to refine the friction points.
content.conversion_block: Stop guessing what works and start shipping features that actually convert. You have the tools, the roadmap, and the expertise to build a world-class onboarding experience that turns trial users into lifetime customers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
